recent_60_samples.prompt: Do you know when the gym opens?
recent_60_samples.answer: The campus gym opens at six tomorrow.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did your package ever turn up?
recent_60_samples.answer: They've left your package at the front desk.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you ask about the gallery hours?
recent_60_samples.answer: We found out the gallery closes early on Sundays.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You'll need a permit for the north lot.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where can I pick up the parking permit today?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did the online quiz work out without a laptop?
recent_60_samples.answer: I've borrowed the tablet that the library lends to students.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did the store sort out your refund?
recent_60_samples.answer: I still have not received the refund confirmation.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are the craft supplies running low again?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked whether the craft supplies were restocked already.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you figure out the train schedule?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know whether the late train arrives before midnight tonight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you hear the keynote got relocated?
recent_60_samples.answer: The keynote was moved to the larger hall that holds three hundred.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Was lunch any good at the new dining hall?
recent_60_samples.answer: Honestly, the lentil stew was the highlight today.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you make it to class on time?
recent_60_samples.answer: I caught the early bus this morning.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you free to grab coffee with us?
recent_60_samples.answer: My afternoon seminar runs until almost four.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you ask your advisor about the form?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know whether I'd registered yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you heard back from the housing office?
recent_60_samples.answer: They haven't confirmed my new room yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just transferred here for the semester.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do you keep the recycling bins?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you see where I left the flyers?
recent_60_samples.answer: Someone stacked them on the front desk.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you find out when the gallery opens?
recent_60_samples.answer: Julian found out it opens at twelve sharp.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you switch your project topic?
recent_60_samples.answer: I chose the angle that my advisor recommended.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you enjoy the photography workshop?
recent_60_samples.answer: Yes, the instructor was incredibly patient with us.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you talk to the registrar today?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked whether the transfer form was approved.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did your morning lecture happen on schedule?
recent_60_samples.answer: It was cancelled because of the storm.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I'm new here and looking for the gym.
recent_60_samples.answer: Which building has the swimming pool inside?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you check on your chemistry notes?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked whether someone borrowed them yesterday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you returned that library tablet you borrowed?
recent_60_samples.answer: I no longer need it for my class.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you ask whether the seminar moved?
recent_60_samples.answer: Margot said our class moved to Tuesday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you grab the tickets for the concert?
recent_60_samples.answer: Not yet, but I've reserved two good seats.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you signed up for the volunteer trip?
recent_60_samples.answer: I haven't decided about the schedule yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you talk to Professor Cho after class?
recent_60_samples.answer: I wondered if she still had office hours.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you settle on a project topic yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: We chose the subject that the professor suggested.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you find out about the dining hall hours?
recent_60_samples.answer: I found out the kitchen closes early tonight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you met your new lab partner yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: Mariana joined our chemistry group last week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you pick up the parcel from the desk?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not collected the package yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard the writing center changed its hours.
recent_60_samples.answer: Harold asked me whether the writing center opens early.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You'll need a locker for the gym.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where can I rent a locker on campus?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you find out about the deadline extension?
recent_60_samples.answer: Emma wanted to know when the essays are due.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you chosen a topic for the project?
recent_60_samples.answer: Naomi chose the topic for our group project.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Do you know if the shuttle runs on weekends?
recent_60_samples.answer: Matthew found out our late shuttle skips weekends.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I noticed the seminar isn't in its usual room.
recent_60_samples.answer: Professor Cho moved our seminar to a bigger hall.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I think they finally finished the library renovation.
recent_60_samples.answer: Margot asked me whether the library that just reopened keeps weekend hours.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you book somewhere for our group session?
recent_60_samples.answer: Juan reserved our usual study room that overlooks the main courtyard tonight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you ready for tomorrow's exam?
recent_60_samples.answer: Honestly, I'm pretty nervous about the exam.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Do you know how late the library is open?
recent_60_samples.answer: You'll find the library open until midnight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you check the gym hours?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked whether the gym opens early tomorrow.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you taken those books back?
recent_60_samples.answer: I haven't returned the library books yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you bought all your course books?
recent_60_samples.answer: I wonder if the bookstore still has my textbook.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you find help for chemistry?
recent_60_samples.answer: My friend recommended a tutor who knows chemistry.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Do you know the dining hall hours?
recent_60_samples.answer: I found out the cafeteria closes early on weekends.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Is the late shuttle still running?
recent_60_samples.answer: The shuttle doesn't run this late on weekends.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did your roommate take your charger again?
recent_60_samples.answer: My roommate borrowed my charger again last night.

recent_60_samples.prompt: We're organizing a beach cleanup next weekend.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where can I sign up for the volunteer trip?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you get caught in the rain?
recent_60_samples.answer: I left my umbrella in the lecture hall.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you seen your new dorm yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: You'll love the study lounge in my dorm.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you stop by the writing center?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked when the writing center opens tonight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you do the reading for class?
recent_60_samples.answer: I didn't finish the reading assignment yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you checked the shuttle schedule?
recent_60_samples.answer: I wonder whether the shuttle runs on Sundays.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you learn anything about the museum?
recent_60_samples.answer: I found out the museum offers free tours.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you choose your electives yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: I picked the seminar that meets on Fridays.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you get the lecture slides?
recent_60_samples.answer: It's already posted on the course website.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you meet with your advisor?
recent_60_samples.answer: My advisor suggested a lighter course load this term.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You'll need to hand that form in by Friday.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do I drop off the permission form?
